title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Spa Paradise collects, uses, and protects your information when you visit our website, book an appointment, or purchase a gift card. This is a template policy provided for review; please confirm it with your own legal counsel before launch.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly when you book, contact us, or buy a gift card or package.
bullets: Name, phone number, and email address
Booking details (treatment, preferred date and time, therapist preference, notes)
Purchase details for gift cards and packages
Basic usage data (pages visited and device type)

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to respond to inquiries, confirm and manage your bookings, fulfill gift-card and package purchases, and improve our website.
bullets: Send booking confirmations and gift-card certificates
Improve our services and site experience

sections.heading: Payments
sections.body: Online payments for gift cards and packages are processed by our payment provider (Stripe). We do not store your full card number on our servers. Stripe's handling of payment data is governed by its own privacy policy.

sections.heading: Sharing
sections.body: We share information only as needed to deliver services (for example, our payment provider and email provider) or to comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information, and we do not share it for third-party marketing.

sections.heading: Your Choices
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your contact information at any time by emailing spa.paradise.middletown@gmail.com or calling (845) 800-6600. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Questions about this policy? Contact Spa Paradise at 12 Grove St, Middletown, NY 10940, (845) 800-6600, or spa.paradise.middletown@gmail.com.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Spa Paradise Middletown, NY
seo.description: How Spa Paradise collects, uses, and protects your information when you book, contact us, or buy a gift card in Middletown, NY.
